title: Upload Posts - Upload Videos to Social Media
h2: Your TikTok API solution for developers and content creators
bodyText: Upload Post Users API Keys Upload Calendar Analytics Pricing Docs 👑 ONBOARDING Welcome to Upload-Post Connect your accounts, generate an API key and ship your first multi-platform upload in minutes. Your top content Best performing post in the last 10 days FB PAGE nick lorance life LINKEDIN Personal Not enough data yet Post a few more times to unlock performance insights and track your growth. Create first post Where do you want to integrate next? Pick an option and follow the inline quick start. Code Whitelabel n8n Make Zapier Airtable MCP New Videos We recommend reviewing our documentation directly. We also provide a full-text version you can paste into AI tools to generate integrations anywhere: LLM‑friendly docs (txt). Upload videos 🎥 More info cURL JavaScript Python Copy curl \ -H 'Authorization: Apikey your-api-key-here' \ -F 'video=@/path/to/your/video.mp4' \ -F 'title="Your Video Title"' \ -F 'user="your_profile_user (created in managed users page)"' \ -F 'platform[]=tiktok' \ -X POST https://api.upload-post.com/api/upload Upload photos 📸 More info cURL JavaScript Python Copy curl \ -H 'Authorization: Apikey your-api-key-here' \ -F 'photos[]=@/path/to/your/image1.jpg' \ -F 'photos[]=@/path/to/your/image2.png' \ -F 'user="your_profile_user (created in managed users page)"' \ -F 'platform[]=instagram' \ -F 'title="My Awesome Photo Album"' \ -F 'description="Check out these cool photos!"' \ -X POST https://api.upload-post.com/api/upload_photos Upload text 💬 More info cURL JavaScript Python Copy curl \ -H 'Authorization: Apikey your-api-key-here' \ -F 'user="your_profile_user (created in managed users page)"' \ -F 'platform[]=x' \ -F 'title="This is my amazing tweet content!"' \ -F 'caption="Optional: A caption for stats & tracking."' \ -X POST https://api.upload-post.com/api/upload_text Official libraries Python (pip) Node.js (npm) UploadPost Your API solution for all social media platforms. Simplifying content management for developers and creators.
